# Grandfathered over-cap modules — SOFT-CAP-EXEMPT MEMBERSHIP (one bare path per line).
#
# This file lists the files allowed to exceed the 800-LOC soft cap (docs/architecture.md
# "Module-size policy"). It is intentionally kept in the legacy BARE-PATH format so the
# module-size gate stays green in BOTH directions across the ratchet rollout (story S1 /
# 9cf3): a change that adds the ratchet is verified by `main`'s CURRENT gate, which reads
# THIS file with a full-line compare — mirroring the prompt-index gate's "green across the
# move in both directions" pattern.
#
# The per-file GROWTH CEILING lives in the sibling `.github/module-size-ceilings.txt`
# ("<path> <max-lines>"): membership here, the ratchet number there. The two files are
# kept in sync (asserted by tests/unit/test_module_size_contract.py) — every path below
# has a ceiling row, and vice versa. Adding a row (here + a ceiling there) or raising a
# ceiling is a deliberate, reviewed act, and each file carries a remedy row in
# docs/architecture.md. A file that drops back under the soft cap graduates off BOTH files.
src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/inbound_differ.py
src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile.py
src/rebar/config.py
src/rebar/llm/plan_review/attest.py
src/rebar/llm/plan_review/det_floor.py
src/rebar/llm/plan_review/passes.py
src/rebar/llm/workflow/lint_refs.py
src/rebar/llm/workflow/gate_dispatch.py
src/rebar/llm/runner.py
